The canvas now is not displaying any county when we select a county. Or i dont know whatr is happening. Looks like a small issue though. 










Gorgeous. Now i see where the issue was. I think only the active county was rendering, 
then it somehow made Samburu the only active county and we didn't have a way of selecting a county to be active. 

Now we do, that's why i can see them. We look good. Thank you.

Now, inside MapPage, for each county we select, we want to see it's details on the side. That is, capital, code, sub-counties etc. Or what you think?

Instead of the tooltip with info. The tooltip should be just that, no info, maybe only county number or what we call county code. What do you think/see? be flexible, i like the results.
